254.reason: The check is redundant and may cause incorrect parsing (e.g., adding an extra quote)

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  The check is redundant and may cause incorrect parsing (e.g., adding an extra quote)
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [This check is incorrect: after exiting the while loop, either curChar is '\'' or we've reached end of line. If it's '\'', we already appended it in the loop condition check; this extra check leads to consuming an extra '\'' and corrupting parsing. Also, it fails to handle unterminated char constants properly.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [This check is incorrect and leads to malformed character constant parsing; it should not expect a third single quote. The loop already consumes up to the closing quote, so this extra check causes misinterpretation of valid or invalid character constants.]

12.reason: [Error: After setting flag to false, the rest of the line after "*/" is ignored, but it should be processed as normal code. For example, a line like "some code /* comment */ more code" would lose "more code". This causes missing tokens.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: After setting flag to false, the rest of the line after "*/" is ignored, but it should be processed as normal code. For example, a line like "some code /* comment */ more code" would lose "more code". This causes missing tokens.]

220.reason: [Missing boundary check for curPos < nowLine.length() causes an infinite loop when the pointer reaches the end of the line, as getNextChar() stops updating curChar but isSpace() continues to return true]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Missing boundary check for curPos < nowLine.length() causes an infinite loop when the pointer reaches the end of the line, as getNextChar() stops updating curChar but isSpace() continues to return true]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Missing boundary check (curPos < nowLine.length()) causes an infinite loop when a line ends with whitespace, as getNextChar() stops updating curChar but isSpace() remains true
